ast.name: error
ast.source: forceFrameRate takes a positive int between 0 and 125, forcing frame rates higher than 125 fps is not supported

ast.source: Failed to fetch existing saved prompt:

ast.source: Failed to fetch saved prompt list:

ast.source: Could not parse message into JSON:
ast.target: 无法将消息解析为 JSON：

ast.source: No content in the first response choice
ast.target: 第一个响应选项中没有内容

ast.name: error
ast.source: [Zulu Agent] Failed to load settings, using defaults:
ast.target: [Zulu Agent] 加载设置失败，使用默认值：

ast.name: log
ast.target: [Zulu Agent] 工具消息配对检查：

ast.name: warn
ast.target: 提供的设置无效，使用默认值：

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Please enter a content for your saved prompt
ast.target: 请输入您保存的提示的内容

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Please enter a name for your saved prompt
ast.target: 请输入您保存的提示的名称

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: A saved prompt with this name already exists
ast.target: 已存在同名的保存提示

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Failed to load saved prompt. Please try again.
ast.target: 加载保存提示失败。请重试。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Failed to load saved prompts. Please try refreshing the settings.
ast.target: 加载保存提示失败。请尝试刷新设置。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Failed to delete saved prompt. Please try again.
ast.target: 删除保存提示失败。请重试。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 温度必须在 0 到 2 之间

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: A model with this ID already exists
ast.target: 已存在具有此 ID 的模型

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Cannot remove model that is currently selected as Chat Model
ast.target: 无法移除当前选为聊天模型的模型

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Cannot disable model that is currently selected as Chat Model
ast.target: 无法禁用当前选为聊天模型的模型

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: A provider with this ID already exists
ast.target: 已存在具有此 ID 的提供商

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The name of the saved prompt

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Choose the model you want to use for chat by default.
ast.target: 选择您默认用于聊天的模型。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Select the API provider for this model
ast.target: 选择此模型的 API 提供商

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A unique identifier for this model (e.g. 'my-custom-model')
ast.target: 此模型的唯一标识符（例如 'my-custom-model'）

ast.name: desc
ast.target: API 模型名称（例如 'gpt-4o' 或 'deepseek-chat'）

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Price per 1 million cached input tokens (cache hit). Leave empty to use default pricing.
ast.target: 每 100 万个缓存输入令牌（缓存命中）的价格。留空以使用默认定价。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Price per 1 million uncached input tokens (cache miss). Leave empty to use default pricing.
ast.target: 每 100 万个未缓存输入令牌（缓存未命中）的价格。留空以使用默认定价。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Price per 1 million output tokens. Leave empty to use default pricing.
ast.target: 每百万输出令牌的价格。留空则使用默认定价。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Enable reasoning/thinking mode for this model.
ast.target: 为此模型启用推理/思考模式。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Controls reasoning depth level. Default is "medium".
ast.target: 控制推理深度级别。默认为“中等”。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Controls randomness in responses. Lower values are more deterministic (0-2). Default is 0.6.
ast.target: 控制响应的随机性。较低的值更具确定性（0-2）。默认为0.6。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The API structure used by the provider. If you are not sure, select OpenAI.
ast.target: 提供商使用的API结构。如果不确定，请选择OpenAI。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A unique identifier for this provider (e.g. 'openai')
ast.target: 此提供商的唯一标识符（例如 'openai'）

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When enabled, the content of the selected markdown file will be used as the system prompt for every chat. The file is read fresh at the start of each chat session.
ast.target: 启用后，所选Markdown文件的内容将用作每次聊天的系统提示。该文件会在每个聊天会话开始时重新读取。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Select a markdown file from your vault whose content will be used as the system prompt.
ast.target: 从您的知识库中选择一个Markdown文件，其内容将用作系统提示。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Automatically include the content of your current file in chats.
ast.target: 自动在聊天中包含当前文件的内容。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Include files at the vault root level (not inside any folder) in vault structure. Enabled by default — root files would otherwise be excluded when folders are selected.
ast.target: 将知识库根级别（不在任何文件夹内）的文件包含在知识库结构中。默认启用——否则当选择文件夹时，根文件将被排除。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When enabled, all file types (PDFs, images, etc.) are listed in the vault structure. By default only .md, .canvas and .base files are included.
ast.target: 启用后，所有文件类型（PDF、图像等）都会列在知识库结构中。默认情况下，仅包含 .md、.canvas 和 .base 文件。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Select folders to include in the vault structure context. Selected folders appear at the top. When a folder is selected, everything beneath it is also selected and hidden from the list. Leave empty to send the entire vault.
ast.target: 选择要包含在知识库结构上下文中的文件夹。选定的文件夹会显示在顶部。选择一个文件夹时，其下的所有内容也会被选定并从列表中隐藏。留空则发送整个知识库。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The word or phrase to search for

ast.name: desc
ast.target: 区分大小写搜索。默认为false

ast.name: desc
ast.source: List of file paths to search within
ast.target: 要在其中搜索的文件路径列表

ast.name: desc
ast.source: File path relative to vault root (e.g. "folder/note.md")
ast.target: 相对于知识库根目录的文件路径（例如 \"folder/note.md\"）

ast.name: desc
ast.source: File path relative to vault root
ast.target: 相对于知识库根目录的文件路径

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Exact text to find and replace. Must match whitespace exactly. Provide enough context to be unique.
ast.target: 要查找和替换的精确文本。必须精确匹配空白。提供足够的上下文以确保唯一性。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Replacement text. Use empty string to delete.
ast.target: 替换文本。使用空字符串可删除。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Operation to perform on the file

ast.name: desc
ast.source: File path relative to vault root including extension
ast.target: 相对于知识库根目录的文件路径，包含扩展名

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Required for "create". Initial content of the file
ast.target: “创建”操作必需。文件的初始内容

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Current file path relative to vault root
ast.target: 当前文件相对于知识库根目录的路径

ast.name: desc
ast.source: New file path relative to vault root
ast.target: 新文件相对于知识库根目录的路径

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Operation to perform on the folder
ast.target: 要对文件夹执行的操作

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Folder path relative to vault root (e.g. "Projects/New Folder")
ast.target: 相对于知识库根目录的文件夹路径（例如 \"Projects/New Folder\"）

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Current folder path relative to vault root
ast.target: 当前文件夹相对于知识库根目录的路径

ast.name: desc
ast.source: New folder path relative to vault root
ast.target: 新文件夹相对于知识库根目录的路径

ast.name: desc
ast.target: CSS代码片段的文件名（例如 \"my-theme.css\"）

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Filename of the CSS snippet to edit
ast.target: 要编辑的CSS代码片段的文件名

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Exact text to find and replace
ast.target: 要查找和替换的精确文本

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Operation to perform on the snippet
ast.target: 要对代码片段执行的操作

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Required for "create". CSS content for the snippet
ast.target: “创建”操作必需。代码片段的CSS内容

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Maximum number of consecutive tool calls before requiring user confirmation. Higher values can increase cost.
ast.target: 在需要用户确认之前，允许的最大连续工具调用次数。较高的值可能会增加成本。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Read a file from the vault (.md, .base, .canvas only). Use sparingly — large files cost many tokens. Path is relative to vault root (e.g., "Notes/My Note.md").
ast.target: 从知识库中读取文件（仅限 .md、.base、.canvas）。请谨慎使用——大文件会消耗大量令牌。路径相对于知识库根目录（例如 \"Notes/My Note.md\"）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: File path relative to vault root.
ast.target: 相对于知识库根目录的文件路径。

ast.name: description
ast.source: EXACT text to replace. Must be unique in the file. Include 2-3 surrounding lines if needed.
ast.target: 要替换的精确文本。必须在文件中唯一。如果需要，请包含2-3行周围内容。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 替换文本。空字符串表示删除。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Search all .md, .base, .canvas vault files for a word or phrase. Returns file paths and matching line numbers. Prefer search_files when you know the target files.
ast.target: 在所有 .md、.base、.canvas 知识库文件中搜索单词或短语。返回文件路径和匹配的行号。当您知道目标文件时，请优先使用 search_files。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Word or phrase to search for.

ast.name: description
ast.source: Search specific .md, .base, .canvas vault files for a word or phrase. Use when you know which files to search. Returns matching line numbers per file.
ast.target: 在特定的 .md、.base、.canvas 知识库文件中搜索单词或短语。当您知道要搜索哪些文件时使用。返回每个文件的匹配行号。

ast.name: description
ast.source: File paths to search (relative to vault root).
ast.target: 要搜索的文件路径（相对于知识库根目录）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Create or delete a vault file. Requires user approval. For create: provide path + content (.md/.canvas/.base). For delete: provide path only (permanent).
ast.target: 创建或删除知识库文件。需要用户批准。创建：提供路径 + 内容（.md/.canvas/.base）。删除：仅提供路径（永久性）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: File path relative to vault root, e.g. "Notes/My Note.md".
ast.target: 相对于知识库根目录的文件路径，例如 \"Notes/My Note.md\"。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Required for create. File content (markdown, JSON canvas, etc.).
ast.target: 创建操作必需。文件内容（Markdown、JSON canvas等）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Create or delete a vault folder. Requires user approval. Create creates parents as needed. Delete only works on empty folders.
ast.target: 创建或删除知识库文件夹。需要用户批准。创建时会按需创建父文件夹。删除仅适用于空文件夹。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Folder path relative to vault root, e.g. "Projects/New".
ast.target: 相对于知识库根目录的文件夹路径，例如 \"Projects/New\"。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Rename or move a vault file. Requires user approval. Provide current and new path.
ast.target: 重命名或移动知识库文件。需要用户批准。提供当前路径和新路径。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Rename or move a vault folder (all contents move with it). Requires user approval.
ast.target: 重命名或移动知识库文件夹（所有内容随之移动）。需要用户批准。

ast.name: description
ast.source: List all vault CSS snippets. Returns filenames.
ast.target: 列出所有知识库CSS代码片段。返回文件名。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Read the content of a vault CSS snippet. Provide the filename (e.g. "my-theme.css").
ast.target: 读取知识库CSS代码片段的内容。提供文件名（例如 \"my-theme.css\"）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Edit a CSS snippet by exact string replacement. Requires user approval. Must read snippet first. old_string must be UNIQUE — include surrounding lines if ambiguous.
ast.target: 通过精确字符串替换编辑CSS代码片段。需要用户批准。必须先读取代码片段。old_string 必须唯一——如果模糊，请包含周围行。

ast.name: description
ast.source: EXACT text to replace. Must be unique in the snippet.
ast.target: 要替换的精确文本。必须在代码片段中唯一。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Create or delete a vault CSS snippet. Requires user approval. For create: provide filename (.css) + content. For delete: provide filename (permanent).
ast.target: 创建或删除知识库CSS代码片段。需要用户批准。创建：提供文件名（.css）+ 内容。删除：提供文件名（永久性）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Required for create. The CSS content.

ast.name: description
ast.source: Search all files in the vault for a word or phrase. Use for broad vault-wide searches.
ast.target: 在知识库的所有文件中搜索单词或短语。用于广泛的全库搜索。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Search for a word or phrase within one or more specific files. Use when you know which files to look in.
ast.target: 在一个或多个特定文件中搜索单词或短语。当您知道要查找哪些文件时使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Read the full content of a file from the vault.
ast.target: 从知识库中读取文件的完整内容。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Replace text in a vault file. Requires user approval. old_string must be unique — include surrounding lines if ambiguous.
ast.target: 替换知识库文件中的文本。需要用户批准。old_string 必须唯一——如果模糊，请包含周围行。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Create or delete a file in the vault. Set action to "create" or "delete". Requires user approval.
ast.target: 在知识库中创建或删除文件。将操作设置为 \"create\" 或 \"delete\"。需要用户批准。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Rename or move a file within the vault. Requires user approval.
ast.target: 在知识库中重命名或移动文件。需要用户批准。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Create or delete a folder in the vault. Set action to "create" or "delete". Requires user approval.
ast.target: 在知识库中创建或删除文件夹。将操作设置为 \"create\" 或 \"delete\"。需要用户批准。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Rename or move a folder within the vault. All contents are moved. Requires user approval.
ast.target: 在知识库中重命名或移动文件夹。所有内容都会随之移动。需要用户批准。

ast.name: description
ast.source: List all CSS snippets available in the vault.
ast.target: 列出知识库中所有可用的CSS代码片段。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Read the content of a specific CSS snippet.
ast.target: 读取特定CSS代码片段的内容。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Edit a CSS snippet by making an exact string replacement. Requires user approval and prior reading of the snippet.
ast.target: 通过精确字符串替换编辑CSS代码片段。需要用户批准并事先读取代码片段。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Create or delete a CSS snippet. Set action to "create" or "delete". Requires user approval.
ast.target: 创建或删除CSS代码片段。将操作设置为 \"create\" 或 \"delete\"。需要用户批准。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Missing or invalid "path" parameter. Provide the file path relative to the vault root.
ast.target: 缺少或无效的 \"path\" 参数。请提供相对于知识库根目录的文件路径。

ast.name: error
ast.target: 缺少或无效的 \"path\" 参数。

ast.name: error
ast.target: 缺少或无效的 \"old_string\" 参数。

ast.name: error
ast.target: 缺少或无效的 \"new_string\" 参数。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Missing or invalid "query" parameter. Provide the word or phrase to search for.
ast.target: 缺少或无效的 \"query\" 参数。请提供要搜索的单词或短语。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Missing or invalid "paths" parameter. Provide an array of file paths to search.
ast.target: 缺少或无效的 \"paths\" 参数。请提供要搜索的文件路径数组。

ast.name: error
ast.source: None of the specified paths were found in the vault.
ast.target: 在知识库中未找到指定的任何路径。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Missing or invalid "action" parameter. Must be "create" or "delete".
ast.target: 缺少或无效的 \"action\" 参数。必须是 \"create\" 或 \"delete\"。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Missing or invalid "content" parameter. Provide the file content for "create" action.
ast.target: 缺少或无效的 \"content\" 参数。请为 \"create\" 操作提供文件内容。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Missing or invalid "path" parameter. Provide the folder path relative to the vault root.
ast.target: 缺少或无效的 \"path\" 参数。请提供相对于知识库根目录的文件夹路径。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Missing or invalid "path" parameter. Provide the current file path.
ast.target: 缺少或无效的 \"path\" 参数。请提供当前文件路径。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Missing or invalid "new_path" parameter. Provide the new file path.
ast.target: 缺少或无效的 \"new_path\" 参数。请提供新文件路径。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Missing or invalid "path" parameter. Provide the current folder path.
ast.target: 缺少或无效的 \"path\" 参数。请提供当前文件夹路径。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Missing or invalid "new_path" parameter. Provide the new folder path.
ast.target: 缺少或无效的 \"new_path\" 参数。请提供新文件夹路径。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Missing or invalid "filename" parameter. Provide the CSS snippet filename (e.g., "my-theme.css").
ast.target: 缺少或无效的 \"filename\" 参数。请提供CSS代码片段文件名（例如 \"my-theme.css\"）。

ast.name: error
ast.target: 缺少或无效的 \"filename\" 参数。

ast.name: error
ast.target: 文件名必须以 .css 结尾（例如 \"my-theme.css\"）。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Missing or invalid "content" parameter. Provide the CSS content for "create" action.
ast.target: 缺少或无效的 \"content\" 参数。请为 \"create\" 操作提供CSS内容。

ast.name: label
ast.target: 列出 CSS 代码片段

ast.name: label
ast.target: 读取 CSS 代码片段

ast.name: label
ast.target: 编辑 CSS 代码片段

ast.name: label
ast.target: CSS 代码片段创建/删除

ast.name: name
ast.target: 最大自动工具迭代次数

ast.name: name
ast.target: 将选中内容添加到聊天

ast.name: text
ast.source: No CSS snippets found. The CSS snippets folder does not exist yet.
ast.target: 未找到 CSS 代码片段。CSS 代码片段文件夹尚不存在。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No CSS snippets found. The CSS snippets folder is empty.
ast.target: 未找到 CSS 代码片段。CSS 代码片段文件夹为空。
